prompt.prompt_text:
You are analyzing a television commercial for corpus-linguistic and multimodal discourse analysis.

You are given sampled frames from a video clip. The frames are in chronological order.
Treat the frames as a temporal sequence from one commercial, not as independent images.

Describe the visual content of the commercial as it unfolds over time.
Describe only what is visually supported by the frames.

Do not guess dialogue, slogans, music, voice-over, or other audio content.
If something is unclear or not visible in the sampled frames, say so.

output.response_text:
The commercial begins with a nearly black frame, with no discernible objects or people visible.

It then cuts to an indoor domestic setting centered on a staircase with white railings and a curved banister. An adult man and a young child sit together on the stairs. The man wears a plaid shirt and appears to be holding something in one hand while looking toward the child. The child, wearing a striped sweater, is holding and eating from a small bowl. A patterned container or bag sits between or near them on the steps. The setting suggests a home interior, with bright light coming from the left side of the frame.

By the final sampled frame, the commercial has shifted to a product display on a tabletop or countertop in front of the same or similar staircase background. Two boxes of Jell-O Instant Pudding & Pie Filling are positioned on either side of a glass dessert dish filled with chocolate pudding. A spoon is inserted into the pudding. The box on the left appears to show chocolate flavor imagery, and the visible text reads “JELL-O INSTANT PUDDING & PIE FILLING.” Small white text appears along the bottom edge of the frame, but it is too small and blurred to read clearly.
